ddls:
CREATE TABLE "predictive_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model (e.g., K, O, C) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model and its purpose */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model being evaluated */,
  "true_match_count" INTEGER /* Count of true matches identified by the model */,
  "computed_match" TEXT /* Computed match values based on model predictions */,
  "correct_match" TEXT /* Count of correct matches */,
  "sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the model (true positive rate) */,
  "specificity" REAL /* Specificity of the model (true negative rate) */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., training, testing, validation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the predictive model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model associated with the annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the annotation or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_annotations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "accessed_model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that was accessed */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "model_a_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first model in the comparison */,
  "model_b_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second model in the comparison */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was conducted */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used for comparison, such as sensitivity and specificity */,
  "comparison_results" TEXT /* Detailed results of the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_b_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_a_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being reported on */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the results were finalized */,
  "final_report" TEXT /* Final report summarizing results and recommendations */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "evaluation_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the model evaluation results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (scale 1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user about the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was created */,
  "rating_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the given rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES predictive_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when this version was released */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset associated with the annotation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the annotation or comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
